programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Andy Dalton threw a 13-yard touchdown pass to A.J. Green with seconds remaining, which lifted the Cincinnati Bengals to a 37-36 win over the Atlanta Falcons during Week 4 of the 2018 NFL season.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Don Donatello & Stefanie Kenoyer; Al Del Greco
programme.desc: Don Donatello earned notoriety for his outbursts and antics, but quickly became heralded as a gritty competitor. Appearances on Big Break IV U.S. vs. Europe and Big Break Reunion solidified Donatello as legendary.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with former Big Break competitors Isaac Sanchez and Chad Pfeifer.Sanchez, who goes by the nickname "Sasquatch," is in actuality a gentle giant. But that didn't stop the competitor in him from creating some mythical moments.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Mallory Blackwelder, Julien Trudeau & Robbie Biershenk
programme.desc: They began as members of opposite teams on Big Break Ireland; Mallory Blackwelder and Julien Trudeau ended as the series' first married couple; in between, Mallory was a standout on Big Break NFL for Team Brown; meet the rest of their new team.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Sara Brown graced Golf Channel screens with strong runs at Big Break Sandals and Big Break Dominican Republic; she is running a family, occasionally herding preschoolers and being the ultimate team mom for her husband’s other successful squad.
